title: Babes Pregnancy Crisis Support
text:
Babes Pregnancy Crisis Support - SupportGoWhere
Babes Pregnancy Crisis Support
Share link
For individuals aged 21 and below needing support with their pregnancy, so that they are aware of their options and are able to make an informed decision regarding their pregnancy.
SERVICE HIGHLIGHTS
Centre-based, Helpline
Free
Referral not required
HELPLINE
6206 6641
Open 24 hours
SERVICE PROVIDERS
Find service providers near you
Collapse all sections
About this support

Supports pregnant teens through:
* 24-hour helpline
* Casework and counselling
* Practical support (befriender, baby essentials, employment & back to school assistance etc), information & resources
* Outreach and youth engagement events

Who is this for?

Pregnant teenager who needs help

Anyone who needs information about teenage pregnancy

Singapore Citizens and Permanent Residents

What to expect?

- Teenagers who require help with their pregnancy and/or anyone who needs information about teenage pregnancy may contact Babes via the 24-hour helpline (call/text).
- When an enquiry is attended to, the Helpliner will also assess if the teenager is eligible to be a case under Babes.
- Should the assessment be one that Babes can assist, Babes will arrange for a meeting with the teenager and/or her family/partner within 3-5 working days to assess the needs and provide the necessary support and guidance.
- Babes caseworker will check in with the teenager and/or family about once a week, depending on the client's needs and preferences.

How to apply?

If you are a pregnant teen who needs help, know of one who needs help or need information about teenage pregnancy, please contact Babes' 24-hour helpline at 6206 6641 or text via Whatsapp at 8111 3535 to speak to the caseworkers.

Information last updated on 10 Sep 2025
